title: Foreign key malfunction when parent and child are the same WITHOUT ROWID table and parent key is not also PRIMARY KEY
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b VARCHAR(255), c VARCHAR(255), d VARCHAR(255), e VARCHAR(255));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx ON t2(d, e);
INSERT INTO t2(a, b, c, d, e) VALUES(1, 'one', 'one', 'one', 'one');
INSERT INTO t2(a, b, c, d, e) VALUES(2, 'two', 'two', 'one', NULL);
key_bug_features: Foreign key malfunction in WITHOUT ROWID table
